gmcm.characterSheetKeyTooltip: Key to open the character sheet
gmcm.gossipDiaryKeyTooltip: Key to open the gossip diary
gmcm.hubKeyTooltip: Key to open the hub (diary, arcs, letters, gossip)
gmcm.scenePlannerKeyTooltip: Optional key to open the outings planner directly. Leave empty to disable.
gmcm.gossipEnabledTooltip: Enable the NPC gossip/collective memory system
gmcm.compactionIntervalTooltip: Days between memory compactions (5-15 days, default 15)
gmcm.experimentalDialogueModeTooltip: Only one experimental mode can be active at a time. Off adds no extra prompt block.
gmcm.experimentalDialogueModeHelp: An Alien in the Valley: you came from another galaxy to plant parsnips. Mayor Mode: Pelican Town thinks Lewis retired and you are mayor now. Slasher Mode: spooky rumors wonder what is under the farm soil. Valley Heartthrob: you are irresistible. Valley Heartthrob (Cute): they think you look good, but keep it sweet. Vampire Mode - Do You Sparkle in the Sun?: maybe your charm needs sunscreen. Yandere Mode: too much affection, not enough common sense.
gmcm.socialDramaEnabledTooltip: Allow gossip to change NPC opinions and create sharper social tension.
gmcm.dynamicPersonalitiesTooltip: NPC personalities can slowly evolve from repeated interactions in this save.
gmcm.dynamicOrientationDiscoveryTooltip: Adult NPCs can privately question or recognize attraction after repeated respectful flirts. On by default.
gmcm.npcNpcRomancesTooltip: Adult NPC social moments can slowly become crushes or romantic curiosity. On by default.
gmcm.adultRelationshipDramaTooltip: Enable adult-only relationship conflict such as marital tension and risky attraction. Off by default.
gmcm.allowInfidelityArcsTooltip: Allow affair-contemplation states only when adult drama is also enabled. Off by default.
gmcm.protectCanonicalMarriagesTooltip: Keep canon marriages from escalating into affair arcs. Recommended on.
gmcm.relationshipProposalsTooltip: Allow dating and marriage proposals through free-text dialogue. Bouquet and pendant still work.
gmcm.relationshipDatingProposalsTooltip: Show the Ask to date option for eligible NPCs.
gmcm.relationshipMarriageProposalsToolti: Show the Propose marriage option for eligible dating NPCs.
gmcm.proposalRejectionCooldownTooltip: Days before the player can ask again after a rejection.
gmcm.requireHouseForDialogueMarriageTool: Require the vanilla house upgrade before dialogue marriage proposals.
gmcm.inviteOutActionTooltip: Show a dialogue action to invite eligible NPCs to spend time together. It is social by default, not necessarily romantic.
gmcm.inviteOutMinHeartsTooltip: Minimum hearts required before the Hang out action appears.
gmcm.inviteOutAcceptedCooldownTooltip: Days before the player can invite the same NPC again after they accept.
gmcm.inviteOutRejectedCooldownTooltip: Days before the player can invite the same NPC again after they refuse.
gmcm.socialDramaIntensityTooltip: How strongly gossip can shift opinions: Cozy, Balanced, or Telenovela.
gmcm.opinionShiftsFromGossipTooltip: NPCs can become annoyed, suspicious, protective, or cold based on gossip they know.
gmcm.playerIntrigueActionsTooltip: The farmer can nudge NPC opinions by praising, defending, warning, or badmouthing other villagers in dialogue.
gmcm.npcBadmouthingTooltip: NPCs with enough social tension may privately vent or make sharper comments.
gmcm.skipPointsTooltip: Friendship points when skipping a conversation (Skip button)
gmcm.maxFriendshipPointsPerInteractionTo: Maximum friendship points awarded per AI interaction (0-100). Set to 0 to disable friendship points entirely.
gmcm.turnsPerConversationTooltip: Maximum turns per NPC interaction (1 = legacy single-turn behavior, up to 15)
gmcm.itemRequestDialogueChanceTooltip: Chance that an eligible first dialogue asks for a small item favor and adds it to the normal quest log.
gmcm.npcInteractionsTooltip: NPCs generate daily micro-interactions with each other
gmcm.dynamicNpcFriendshipsTooltip: NPCs can build friendships, tension, and unlikely social moments beyond scripted relationship pairs.
gmcm.maxActiveArcsTooltip: Maximum number of active story arcs at the same time (each analysis uses 1 API call per week)
gmcm.enableArcConclusionSceneTooltip: Play arc conclusions as vanilla in-game events with default dialogue bubbles.
gmcm.enableMockArcsTooltip: Load debug story arcs on startup for testing the arc system.
gmcm.postResolutionDialogueExpiryDaysToo: How many days after arc resolution NPCs will comment on what happened.
gmcm.arcFizzleThresholdSeasonsTooltip: Seasons without progress before an arc automatically fizzles out.
gmcm.weeklyNewsTooltip: Generate village news weekly (uses 1 API call per week)
gmcm.lettersEnabledTooltip: Enable NPC letters and mailbox delivery.
gmcm.showTokenUsageTooltip: Shows token totals and API request counts in the hub and AI Status tab. Disabled by default.
gmcm.maxNpcInteractionsPerDayTooltip: Maximum NPC↔NPC interactions per day (some can use local templates)
gmcm.npcSocialChaosLevelTooltip: How often the village tries unlikely NPC pairings (0 = safest, 100 = most experimental).
gmcm.npcSocialRareMomentChanceTooltip: Chance that an unlikely pairing becomes a rare or funny social moment.
gmcm.npcSocialTemplateOnlyChanceTooltip: Chance that common NPC social moments use a local template instead of an AI call.
gmcm.allowNpcSocialGossipTooltip: Allow public NPC-to-NPC moments to be marked as gossip context for future dialogue.
gmcm.llmProviderTooltip: Choose Gemini or an OpenAI-compatible/local endpoint.
gmcm.makePrimaryAiProvider: Make this my primary AI provider
gmcm.makeGeminiPrimaryAiProviderTooltip: Use Google Gemini for AliveNpcs AI requests when both Gemini and a custom provider are configured.
gmcm.makeCustomLlmPrimaryAiProviderToolt: Use the custom OpenAI-compatible provider for AliveNpcs AI requests when both Gemini and a custom provider are configured.
gmcm.apiKeyParagraph: Paste your Google AI Studio API key. Get one at: aistudio.google.com/apikey
gmcm.apiKeysTooltip: Use the slider to choose how many key fields you want.
gmcm.apiKeysHelp: You can add more than one Gemini key. If one hits the daily limit, AliveNpcs automatically switches to the next key.
gmcm.customLlmHelp: For local or generic LLMs, select OpenAI-compatible/local and fill the URL/model below. Gemini settings are still kept for fallback or switching back.
gmcm.customLlmPresetTooltip: Quickly fill URL/model defaults for common OpenAI-compatible local servers.
gmcm.customLlmPresetHelp: After choosing a preset, adjust the model name if your local server uses a different model. Use the AI Status tab in the hub to test latency.
gmcm.customLlmBaseUrlTooltip: Base URL for an OpenAI-compatible server, e.g. http://localhost:1234/v1 or http://localhost:11434/v1.
gmcm.customLlmModelTooltip: Model name requested from the custom endpoint, e.g. llama3.1 or local-model.
gmcm.customLlmApiKeyTooltip: Optional. Leave empty for local servers that do not require a key.
gmcm.customLlmTimeoutTooltip: Request timeout in seconds for custom/local LLM calls. Default 300, maximum 500.
gmcm.customLlmSystemPromptTooltip: Disable if your local server only accepts user messages.
gmcm.customLlmReloadConfigEachRequest: Reload custom LLM config from config.json each request
gmcm.customLlmReloadConfigEachRequestToo: When enabled, custom URL/model/API key/system-prompt/timeout settings are reloaded for each request (only when this provider is selected as the primary provider).
gmcm.apiKeyCountTooltip: Set how many key fields are active (1-20). Default is 3.
gmcm.apiKeySlotTooltip: Gemini API key for this slot.
gmcm.apiKeySlotDisabledTooltip: Increase the key count slider to enable this field.
gmcm.allowVanillaDialogueTooltip: Let AliveNpcs-managed NPCs use Stardew Valley's original dialogue after an AI conversation or when AI generation is unavailable. Off by default.
gmcm.geminiThinkingTooltip: Allows supported Gemini models to use internal thinking tokens. Off by default to reduce latency and stalls.
gmcm.llmResponseTokenBudgetTooltip: Minimum output-token budget for normal AI calls. Higher values help avoid cut-off JSON or dialogue, but may increase latency and some providers may reject very high values.
gmcm.maxDialogueLengthTooltip: Maximum visible characters kept per generated dialogue.
gmcm.historyPerNpcTooltip: Maximum conversation entries kept per NPC
gmcm.enableSveTooltip: Enable AliveNpcs for NPCs from Stardew Valley Expanded (SVE)
gmcm.enableOtherNpcModsTooltip: Enable custom NPCs except mods in the mandatory community AI opt-out list
gmcm.npcModsSublistEnabled: Detected NPC mods (runtime): select which mods should use AliveNpcs.
gmcm.npcModsSublistDisabled: Detected NPC mods (runtime): sublist is visible, but disabled until you enable 'other NPC mods'.
gmcm.npcModsNoneDetected: No compatible NPC mods were detected at runtime.
gmcm.npcModEntryTooltipEnabled: Toggle AliveNpcs for this detected NPC mod.
gmcm.npcModEntryTooltipDisabled: Enable 'other NPC mods' first to change this option.

reputation.reliability.veryHigh: talks to everyone regularly, very present

continue/15 10/farmer 14 10 2 Abigail 16 10 3/skippable/AliveNpcsSceneComplete alive.abigail.mine_drumbeat/speak Abigail "Do you hear that little rhythm under the rocks?$u"/speak Abigail "Everyone says mines are just dangerous, but sometimes they sound like they are thinking."/emote Abigail 32/speak Abigail "If I start tapping back, remind me that rocks are terrible bandmates."/end
Abigail told the farmer the mine sometimes sounds like it is thinking.
sceneEvents.alive.abigail.seedshop_blueb: continue/5 17/farmer 4 17 2 Abigail 6 17 3/skippable/AliveNpcsSceneComplete alive.abigail.seedshop_blueberry_dare/speak Abigail "Dad says I cannot make blueberry seeds sound dangerous."/speak Abigail "Challenge accepted."/emote Abigail 32/speak Abigail "Tiny blue spheres of destiny. See? Agriculture can have drama."/end
sceneEvents.alive.alex.joshhouse_photo_b: continue/10 15/farmer 9 15 2 Alex 11 15 3/skippable/AliveNpcsSceneComplete alive.alex.joshhouse_photo_box/speak Alex "Grandma found a box of old photos. I keep pretending I am just looking for sports ones."/speak Alex "There are some of Mom in here. She had my smile, I think."/emote Alex 32/speak Alex "It is weird. Good weird, maybe."/end
Alex looked through old family photos and noticed his mother's smile.
sceneEvents.alive.alex.town_training_cou: continue/40 60/farmer 39 60 2 Alex 41 60 3/skippable/AliveNpcsSceneComplete alive.alex.town_training_count/speak Alex "Forty-eight... forty-nine... wait. Did I count that one twice?"/speak Alex "Great athletes stay honest. Even when math attacks."/emote Alex 32/speak Alex "Call it forty-nine and a half. That sounds professional, right?$h"/end
sceneEvents.alive.caroline.seedshop_tea_: continue/5 17/farmer 4 17 2 Caroline 6 17 3/skippable/AliveNpcsSceneComplete alive.caroline.seedshop_tea_leaf/speak Caroline "This tea leaf curled into a little spiral overnight."/speak Caroline "Plants keep secrets differently than people. They do not lie, but they do wait."/emote Caroline 32/speak Caroline "Maybe that is why I like caring for them."/end
Caroline reflected that plants keep secrets by waiting.
sceneEvents.alive.caroline.town_yoga_not: continue/40 60/farmer 39 60 2 Caroline 41 60 3/skippable/AliveNpcsSceneComplete alive.caroline.town_yoga_notice/speak Caroline "I am putting up a notice for yoga class."/speak Caroline "Pierre suggested I add 'now with improved breathing.'"/emote Caroline 32/speak Caroline "I told him breathing was already a core feature."/end
sceneEvents.alive.clint.blacksmith_tiny_: continue/8 11/farmer 7 11 2 Clint 9 11 3/skippable/AliveNpcsSceneComplete alive.clint.blacksmith_tiny_hinge/speak Clint "This hinge is from a jewelry box. Smaller than my thumb, fussier than a furnace."/speak Clint "People think blacksmithing is all swords and anvils."/emote Clint 32/speak Clint "Sometimes it is convincing a tiny door to stop being dramatic."/end
sceneEvents.alive.clint.town_coal_delive: continue/40 60/farmer 39 60 2 Clint 41 60 3/skippable/AliveNpcsSceneComplete alive.clint.town_coal_delivery/speak Clint "I dropped a coal order and left a little trail across town."/speak Clint "On the bright side, I can find my way home by shame alone."/emote Clint 32/speak Clint "Please pretend that sounded more dignified."/end
sceneEvents.alive.demetrius.mountain_mus: continue/30 12/farmer 29 12 2 Demetrius 31 12 3/skippable/AliveNpcsSceneComplete alive.demetrius.mountain_mushroom_count/speak Demetrius "I counted seven mushrooms here yesterday. Today there are eight."/speak Demetrius "Either reproduction was rapid, or I have been outsmarted by fungus."/emote Demetrius 32/speak Demetrius "Both explanations are scientifically humbling."/end
sceneEvents.alive.demetrius.sciencehouse: continue/8 20/farmer 7 20 2 Demetrius 9 20 3/skippable/AliveNpcsSceneComplete alive.demetrius.sciencehouse_frog_humidity/speak Demetrius "The local frogs are excellent humidity indicators."/speak Demetrius "They are also terrible lab assistants. No respect for clipboards."/emote Demetrius 32/speak Demetrius "Still, their data collection is beautifully enthusiastic."/end
sceneEvents.alive.elliott.beach_first_se: continue/35 35/farmer 34 35 2 Elliott 36 35 3/skippable/AliveNpcsSceneComplete alive.elliott.beach_first_sentence/speak Elliott "I have spent the morning chasing one sentence across three pages."/speak Elliott "It escaped, naturally. Very athletic for a sentence."/emote Elliott 32/speak Elliott "Still, the hunt is noble. Or at least it keeps my ink from drying."/end
sceneEvents.alive.elliott.elliotthouse_c: continue/5 7/farmer 4 7 2 Elliott 6 7 3/skippable/AliveNpcsSceneComplete alive.elliott.elliotthouse_crab_critic/speak Elliott "A crab entered, inspected my manuscript, and left without comment."/speak Elliott "The silence was devastating."/emote Elliott 32/speak Elliott "Still, one must accept criticism from all walks of life, sideways or otherwise."/end
sceneEvents.alive.emily.haleyhouse_dream: continue/10 15/farmer 9 15 2 Emily 11 15 3/skippable/AliveNpcsSceneComplete alive.emily.haleyhouse_dream_fabric/speak Emily "I dreamed this fabric was a little river, so I folded it like water."/speak Emily "Haley says that is not how laundry works."/emote Emily 32/speak Emily "She is right, but the shirt seems happier now."/end
sceneEvents.alive.emily.saloon_thread.sc: continue/10 18/farmer 9 18 2 Emily 11 18 3/skippable/AliveNpcsSceneComplete alive.emily.saloon_thread/speak Emily "I found a blue thread on the floor, and it led me all the way to the door."/speak Emily "Maybe it escaped from a shirt. Maybe it wanted to see the moon.$h"/emote Emily 32/speak Emily "I will sew it into something kind. Escaped things deserve gentle endings."/end
sceneEvents.alive.evelyn.town_seed_packe: continue/40 60/farmer 39 60 2 Evelyn 41 60 3/skippable/AliveNpcsSceneComplete alive.evelyn.town_seed_packet/speak Evelyn "I keep spare flower seeds in my pocket, just in case a bare patch looks lonely."/speak Evelyn "George says I am smuggling spring around town."/emote Evelyn 32/speak Evelyn "He is not entirely wrong, dear."/end
Evelyn said she carries spare flower seeds to brighten lonely places.
sceneEvents.alive.george.joshhouse_remot: continue/10 15/farmer 9 15 2 George 11 15 3/skippable/AliveNpcsSceneComplete alive.george.joshhouse_remote/speak George "Alex says the remote is not lost if it is under my blanket."/speak George "Nonsense. That is a defensive position."/emote George 32/speak George "A man has a right to protect the evening news from channel flippers."/end
sceneEvents.alive.gus.saloon_soup_test.s: continue/10 18/farmer 9 18 2 Gus 11 18 3/skippable/AliveNpcsSceneComplete alive.gus.saloon_soup_test/speak Gus "I am testing a soup that tastes like it should fix a rainy mood."/speak Gus "So far it fixes hunger, which is an honest start.$h"/emote Gus 32/speak Gus "A good town needs warm food and someone willing to refill the pot."/end
sceneEvents.alive.gus.saloon_soup_test.m: Gus said a good town needs warm food and someone willing to refill the pot.
sceneEvents.alive.gus.town_picnic_basket: continue/40 60/farmer 39 60 2 Gus 41 60 3/skippable/AliveNpcsSceneComplete alive.gus.town_picnic_basket/speak Gus "I packed a few extra sandwiches for anyone who forgot lunch."/speak Gus "In a small town, hunger has a way of becoming everybody's business."/emote Gus 32/speak Gus "Besides, food tastes better when it escapes the kitchen now and then."/end
Gus brought extra sandwiches to town in case anyone forgot lunch.
sceneEvents.alive.haley.beach_summer_lig: continue/35 35/farmer 34 35 2 Haley 36 35 3/skippable/AliveNpcsSceneComplete alive.haley.beach_summer_light/speak Haley "Hold still a second. The light is doing that pretty thing on the water."/speak Haley "I used to think a good photo was just about looking perfect."/emote Haley 32/speak Haley "Now I think it is more about catching something before it runs away."/end
Haley told the farmer she is learning to value honest moments in her photography.
sceneEvents.alive.haley.haleyhouse_old_c: continue/10 15/farmer 9 15 2 Haley 11 15 3/skippable/AliveNpcsSceneComplete alive.haley.haleyhouse_old_camera/speak Haley "This old camera still smells like dust and beach days."/speak Haley "I used to take pictures so people would notice me."/emote Haley 32/speak Haley "Now I kind of want to notice them back."/end
Haley said she wants photography to help her notice other people more honestly.
sceneEvents.alive.harvey.hospital_radio_: continue/8 15/farmer 7 15 2 Harvey 9 15 3/skippable/AliveNpcsSceneComplete alive.harvey.hospital_radio_static/speak Harvey "The radio keeps catching weather reports from stations far outside the valley."/speak Harvey "It is oddly comforting. Proof that the world continues past my appointment book."/emote Harvey 32/speak Harvey "Though if the static starts diagnosing patients, I am retiring."/end
Harvey found comfort in distant radio stations reaching the clinic.
sceneEvents.alive.harvey.town_checkup_wa: continue/40 60/farmer 39 60 2 Harvey 41 60 3/skippable/AliveNpcsSceneComplete alive.harvey.town_checkup_walk/speak Harvey "I tell patients to take gentle walks, then forget to take my own advice."/speak Harvey "So this is a professional field test."/emote Harvey 32/speak Harvey "Results suggest sunshine is medically inconvenient but pleasant."/end
sceneEvents.alive.jodi.samhouse_recipe_c: Jodi finds an old recipe card

continue/10 18/farmer 9 18 2 Jodi 11 18 3/skippable/AliveNpcsSceneComplete alive.jodi.samhouse_recipe_card/speak Jodi "I found this recipe card tucked behind the flour."/speak Jodi "Sam drew a guitar on it when he was little. Vincent added what might be a dinosaur."/emote Jodi 32/speak Jodi "Dinner survives a lot in this house. So do memories."/end
Jodi found an old recipe card covered with childhood drawings from Sam and Vincent.
sceneEvents.alive.kent.samhouse_quiet_mo: continue/10 18/farmer 9 18 2 Kent 11 18 3/skippable/AliveNpcsSceneComplete alive.kent.samhouse_quiet_morning/speak Kent "The house was quiet for almost a full minute this morning."/speak Kent "At first I braced for something. Then I heard Vincent drop a spoon."/emote Kent 32/speak Kent "Strange thing to be grateful for, but I was."/end
Kent admitted that an ordinary household noise helped ground him.
sceneEvents.alive.leah.forest_fallen_bra: continue/30 41/farmer 29 41 2 Leah 31 41 3/skippable/AliveNpcsSceneComplete alive.leah.forest_fallen_branch/speak Leah "This branch fell in a perfect curve. No carving needed."/speak Leah "The city made me think art had to be forced out of things."/emote Leah 32/speak Leah "Out here, half the work is learning when to leave something alone."/end
Leah reflected that nature often needs patience more than force.
sceneEvents.alive.leah.leahhouse_chisel_: continue/5 8/farmer 4 8 2 Leah 6 8 3/skippable/AliveNpcsSceneComplete alive.leah.leahhouse_chisel_pause/speak Leah "The hardest part is stopping before I ruin the piece."/speak Leah "I used to stay in places too long for the same reason. I wanted the shape to make sense."/emote Leah 32/speak Leah "Wood tells you when it is done. People should too."/end
Leah compared knowing when a sculpture is done to knowing when to leave a life behind.
sceneEvents.alive.lewis.manorhouse_old_m: continue/10 15/farmer 9 15 2 Lewis 11 15 3/skippable/AliveNpcsSceneComplete alive.lewis.manorhouse_old_minutes/speak Lewis "These old town minutes mention a vote to repair the bridge three mayors ago."/speak Lewis "Every generation thinks it invented urgent paperwork."/emote Lewis 32/speak Lewis "Still, the handwriting is careful. Someone loved this place enough to argue neatly."/end
Lewis found old town minutes showing generations of careful civic work.
sceneEvents.alive.lewis.town_loose_cobbl: continue/40 60/farmer 39 60 2 Lewis 41 60 3/skippable/AliveNpcsSceneComplete alive.lewis.town_loose_cobblestone/speak Lewis "This cobblestone is loose again. I have written it down three times."/speak Lewis "That is local government in miniature: notice, record, repair, repeat."/emote Lewis 32/speak Lewis "It is not glamorous, but fewer twisted ankles is a worthy legacy."/end
Lewis described town maintenance as a quiet but worthy civic legacy.
sceneEvents.alive.linus.forest_berry_map: continue/30 41/farmer 29 41 2 Linus 31 41 3/skippable/AliveNpcsSceneComplete alive.linus.forest_berry_map/speak Linus "There is a berry path here that changes every season, but never disappears."/speak Linus "I do not draw it. Drawing makes people think a place can be owned."/emote Linus 32/speak Linus "Remembering is lighter."/end
Linus said he remembers berry paths instead of mapping them because remembering is lighter.
sceneEvents.alive.linus.mountain_kindlin: continue/30 12/farmer 29 12 2 Linus 31 12 3/skippable/AliveNpcsSceneComplete alive.linus.mountain_kindling/speak Linus "Dry kindling is a small treasure. It asks for attention, not money."/speak Linus "Most comfort is like that, if you know where to look."/emote Linus 32/speak Linus "The mountain teaches slowly, but it teaches every day."/end
Linus told the farmer that the mountain teaches small forms of comfort.
sceneEvents.alive.marnie.animalshop_esca: continue/14 17/farmer 13 17 2 Marnie 15 17 3/skippable/AliveNpcsSceneComplete alive.marnie.animalshop_escape_goat/speak Marnie "One of the goats learned the feed latch again."/speak Marnie "I respect her ambition, but I do not respect her accounting methods."/emote Marnie 32/speak Marnie "If she asks, you did not see me bribing her with hay."/end
sceneEvents.alive.maru.hospital_clipboar: continue/8 15/farmer 7 15 2 Maru 9 15 3/skippable/AliveNpcsSceneComplete alive.maru.hospital_clipboard/speak Maru "I reorganized the clipboards by urgency, then alphabet, then coffee proximity."/speak Maru "Harvey noticed the first two systems."/emote Maru 32/speak Maru "The third is for morale. Clinic science is still science."/end
sceneEvents.alive.maru.sciencehouse_star: continue/8 20/farmer 7 20 2 Maru 9 20 3/skippable/AliveNpcsSceneComplete alive.maru.sciencehouse_star_chart/speak Maru "I logged a faint repeating pulse last night. continue/5 10/farmer 4 10 2 Wizard 6 10 3/skippable/AliveNpcsSceneComplete alive.wizard_ten_valley_ward/speak Wizard "This ward is older than most roofs in town."/speak Wizard "It nudges lost things toward paths where they may be found."/emote Wizard 32/speak Wizard "I think I wanted to say that out loud."/end
The Wizard renews a valley ward: This ward is older than most roofs in town.
sceneEvents.alive.leah_linus_forest_bowl: Leah and Linus repair a wooden bowl

continue/30 41/farmer 29 41 2 Leah 31 41 3 Linus 32 41 3/skippable/AliveNpcsSceneComplete alive.leah_linus_forest_bowl_repair/speak Leah "The crack can become part of the shape."/speak Linus "Useful things often carry history openly."/emote Linus 32/speak Leah "Small moments count more than they seem."/end
Leah and Linus repair a wooden bowl: The crack can become part of the shape.
sceneEvents.alive.experimental.alien_val: A strange welcome at the farmhouse door

continue/64 15/farmer 64 15 2 Wizard 66 15 3 Maru 67 15 3/skippable/AliveNpcsSceneComplete alive.experimental.alien_valley_intro/speak Wizard "The valley has accepted stranger travelers than most maps admit."/speak Maru "If your farm equipment starts receiving star charts, please tell me first."/emote Maru 32/speak Wizard "For now, plant roots here. Even distant visitors need home soil."/end
sceneEvents.alive.experimental.pelican_t: continue/64 15/farmer 64 15 2 Lewis 66 15 3/skippable/AliveNpcsSceneComplete alive.experimental.pelican_town_mayor_intro/speak Lewis "There you are, Mayor. I wanted to thank you for taking office."/speak Lewis "Now that I am no longer mayor, I intend to take retirement very seriously."/emote Lewis 32/speak Lewis "If you need advice, I will be nearby doing absolutely nothing official."/end
sceneEvents.alive.experimental.valley_he: Haley and Alex notice the farm fan club

continue/64 15/farmer 64 15 2 Haley 66 15 3 Alex 67 15 3/skippable/AliveNpcsSceneComplete alive.experimental.valley_heartthrob_intro/speak Haley "So the rumors are true. The whole valley keeps finding reasons to walk past your farm."/speak Alex "I was jogging. Very normal jogging. In your direction."/emote Haley 32/speak Haley "Try not to let the fan club slow down your crops."/end
Emily and Leah offer a gentle farmhouse compliment

continue/64 15/farmer 64 15 2 Emily 66 15 3 Leah 67 15 3/skippable/AliveNpcsSceneComplete alive.experimental.valley_heartthrob_cute_intro/speak Emily "There you are. The room got a little brighter, just like I said it would."/speak Leah "Careful, Emily. Compliments grow faster than parsnips around here."/emote Emily 32/speak Emily "This one is harmless: you look lovely today."/end
sceneEvents.alive.experimental.vampire_i: The Wizard notices a late shadow at the door

continue/64 15/farmer 64 15 2 Wizard 66 15 3/skippable/AliveNpcsSceneComplete alive.experimental.vampire_intro/speak Wizard "Your shadow has been arriving half a heartbeat late."/speak Wizard "Do not look alarmed. In this valley, that is practically polite behavior."/emote Wizard 32/speak Wizard "Still, avoid making promises to mirrors after midnight."/end
sceneEvents.alive.experimental.slasher_i: Sebastian and Abigail manage a spooky rumor

continue/64 15/farmer 64 15 2 Sebastian 66 15 3 Abigail 67 15 3/skippable/AliveNpcsSceneComplete alive.experimental.slasher_intro/speak Sebastian "People are telling scary stories about you again."/speak Abigail "I told them every good town needs one campfire rumor. No details, just atmosphere."/emote Abigail 32/speak Sebastian "If anyone asks, I was never here and this was normal small talk."/end
sceneEvents.alive.experimental.yandere_i: Abigail and Haley guard the first morning

continue/64 15/farmer 64 15 2 Abigail 66 15 3 Haley 67 15 3/skippable/AliveNpcsSceneComplete alive.experimental.yandere_intro/speak Abigail "I heard someone saved you a seat. Bold move."/speak Haley "Relax. Nobody owns a seat, even if some people are clearly guarding it."/emote Abigail 32/speak Abigail "Fine. I am only dramatically concerned about your social schedule."/end
